item.author: amustafa16421

item.title: Laravel 数组助手 | Laravel Array Helpers
item.description:
莫科斯盖德

发表于 3 月 22 日

我在浏览 laravel 新闻博客时发现了一篇非常好的文章，讲的是每个开发人员都应该知道的 Laravel Array Helpers。 我知道它们，但很高兴与您分享它们，因为我知道这个阵列的重要性

use Illuminate\Support\Arr; $stack = ['Tailwind', 'Alpine', 'Laravel', 'Livewire']; Arr::join($stack, ', '); // Tailwind, Alpine, Laravel, Livewire implode($stack, ', '); // Tailwind, Alpine, Laravel, Livewire $stack_2 = ['Tailwind', 'Alpine', 'Laravel', 'Livewire']; Arr::join($stack_2, ', ', ', and'); // Tailwind, Alpine, Laravel, and Livewire
 $array = [ ['product_id' => 'prod-100', 'name' => 'Desk'], ['product_id' => 'prod-200', 'name' => 'Chair'], ]; $keyed = []; foreach ($array as $value) { $keyed[$value['product_id']] = $value; } /* [ 'prod-100' => ['product_id' => 'prod-100', 'name' => 'Desk'], 'prod-200' => ['product_id' => 'prod-200', 'name' => 'Chair'], ] */ // Using the Arr::keyBy() method, you can do the same thing with one line of code $keyed = Arr::keyBy($array, 'product_id');
  • 检查和获取数组中的数据
use Illuminate\Support\Arr; $data = [ 'products' => [ 'desk' => [ 'name' => 'Oakendesk' 'price' => 599.00, 'description' => 'Solid oak desk built from scratch.' ], ], ]; // 599.00 Arr::get($data, 'products.desk.price'); // Returns false Arr::has($data, 'products.desk.discount'); // Returns null Arr::get($data, 'products.desk.discount'); // Returns custom default value if not found. Arr::get($data, 'products.desk.discount', ['type' => 'percent', 'value' => 10]);
  • 获取数组中的第一个或最后一个元素
// end() $array = [100, 200, 300, 110]; end($array); // If your array is empty, though, you will get false instead $array = []; end($array); // false // Using Laravel's last() helper, you have multiple options when an array is empty use Illuminate\Support\Arr; $array = []; Arr::last($array); // null // Provide a default Arr::last($array, null, 100); // 100 // Using Laravel's helper also enables you to pass a closure as a second argument as the condition for which element to return first or last respectively $array = [100, 200, 300, 110]; Arr::last($array, fn ($e) => $e > 110); // 300 Arr::first($array, fn ($e) => $e > 110); // 200
  • 从数组中提取数据
$array = [ ['user' => ['id' => 1, 'name' => 'User 1', 'email' => 'user1@example.com']], ['user' => ['id' => 2, 'name' => 'User 2', 'email' => 'user2@example.com']], ]; $emails = []; foreach ($array as $result) { $emails[] = $result['user']['email']; } /* [ "user1@example.com", "user2@example.com", ] */ // Laravel's Arr::pluck() helper makes this trivial Arr::pluck($array, 'user.email');

我给了你，简而言之，平台中提到的内容，但你必须访问文章

并越来越深入以充分利用。

一旦暂停，Morcosgad 将​​无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被取消。

解除暂停后，morcosgad 将​​能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，morcosgad 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 morcosgad 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 Morcosgad：

降低 morcosgad 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 morcosgad 将​​恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Morcos Gad

Posted on Mar 22

I found a very good article when browsing the laravel news blog that talks about Laravel Array Helpers, which every developer should know. I know about them, but it's great to share them with you because I know the importance of this Array

use Illuminate\Support\Arr; $stack = ['Tailwind', 'Alpine', 'Laravel', 'Livewire']; Arr::join($stack, ', ');
// Tailwind, Alpine, Laravel, Livewire implode($stack, ', ');
// Tailwind, Alpine, Laravel, Livewire $stack_2 = ['Tailwind', 'Alpine', 'Laravel', 'Livewire']; Arr::join($stack_2, ', ', ', and');
// Tailwind, Alpine, Laravel, and Livewire

 $array = [ ['product_id' => 'prod-100', 'name' => 'Desk'], ['product_id' => 'prod-200', 'name' => 'Chair'],
]; $keyed = []; foreach ($array as $value) { $keyed[$value['product_id']] = $value;
} /* [ 'prod-100' => ['product_id' => 'prod-100', 'name' => 'Desk'], 'prod-200' => ['product_id' => 'prod-200', 'name' => 'Chair'], ]
*/ // Using the Arr::keyBy() method, you can do the same thing with one line of code $keyed = Arr::keyBy($array, 'product_id');
  • Checking and Getting Data from an Array 
use Illuminate\Support\Arr; $data = [ 'products' => [ 'desk' => [ 'name' => 'Oakendesk' 'price' => 599.00, 'description' => 'Solid oak desk built from scratch.' ], ],
]; // 599.00
Arr::get($data, 'products.desk.price'); // Returns false
Arr::has($data, 'products.desk.discount'); // Returns null
Arr::get($data, 'products.desk.discount'); // Returns custom default value if not found.
Arr::get($data, 'products.desk.discount', ['type' => 'percent', 'value' => 10]);
  • Getting the first or last element in an array 
// end()
$array = [100, 200, 300, 110];
end($array); // If your array is empty, though, you will get false instead
$array = [];
end($array); // false // Using Laravel's last() helper, you have multiple options when an array is empty
use Illuminate\Support\Arr; $array = []; Arr::last($array); // null // Provide a default
Arr::last($array, null, 100); // 100 // Using Laravel's helper also enables you to pass a closure as a second argument as the condition for which element to return first or last respectively
$array = [100, 200, 300, 110]; Arr::last($array, fn ($e) => $e > 110); // 300
Arr::first($array, fn ($e) => $e > 110); // 200
  • Plucking Data from an Array 
$array = [ ['user' => ['id' => 1, 'name' => 'User 1', 'email' => 'user1@example.com']], ['user' => ['id' => 2, 'name' => 'User 2', 'email' => 'user2@example.com']],
]; $emails = []; foreach ($array as $result) { $emails[] = $result['user']['email'];
} /*
[ "user1@example.com", "user2@example.com",
]
*/ // Laravel's Arr::pluck() helper makes this trivial
Arr::pluck($array, 'user.email');

I gave you, in short, what was mentioned in the platform, but you must visit the article

and go deeper and deeper to take full advantage.

Once suspended, morcosgad will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, morcosgad will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by morcosgad will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If morcosgad is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag morcosgad:

Make all posts by morcosgad less visible

morcosgad consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging morcosgad will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: morcosgad

item.title: 是时候重命名无服务器了 | It's time to rename serverless
item.description:
这是一篇简短的文章。

沃德利映射理论讨论了事物如何在进化过程中获得新的意义。

  • 云在 2023 年的意义与 2010 年不同
  • 平台在 2023 年与 2000 年的意义不同
  • 所以让我回到一些基础知识。

    什么是云？

    云的概念最初是基于标准构建并通过网络分发给用户的工业化、可互操作和商品化的基础设施服务。 今天，云的概念扩展了这个定义，包括由服务、功能和原则组成的系统的概念，这些服务、功能和原则可以协调工作，让用户能够正确地构建事物。 根据这个定义，云平台的价值主张是关于满足业务领先目标，例如开发速度、可靠性、安全性、敏捷性和效率。

    基础设施服务：这些服务和功能的集合基本上是作为服务提供的虚拟机。 示例：亚马逊 EC2

  • 运行时服务：这个服务和功能的集合是作为服务提供的运行时。 示例：AWS Lambda。

  • 应用程序服务：此服务和功能的集合是作为服务提供的应用程序。 示例：Salesforce CRM。

问题是，到 2023 年，您无需拥有数据中心并将基础设施作为按使用付费服务进行分发即可成为云提供商：

  • 什么是内容？

    内容是平台用户拥有并放入平台以构建合适的东西的集合。 换句话说，内容由用户在平台上拥有的内容定义。

    我们根据服务提供不同类型的内容：

    • 对于基础设施服务：用户拥有运行时、代码和数据。

    • 对于运行时服务：用户拥有代码和数据。

    • 对于应用服务：用户只拥有数据。

    那么什么是无服务器？

    得益于 Google AppEngine 和 AWS Lambda 的服务，无服务器的概念始于按需功能。 今天，我们可以找到复杂的定义，其中包括函数即服务和后端即服务的组合，特别是自从引入无服务器容器以来。 对我来说，无服务器的概念在 2023 年演变为运行时即服务，可扩展到零，用户拥有代码和数据。 就这么简单。

    所以，当我看到一项新服务时，我会问自己两个问题：

    • 我拥有什么？
    • 它是如何扩展的？

    根据这两个问题的答案，我在心里对我正在使用的平台类型进行分类。 当我拥有代码和数据并且服务规模为零时，我知道我正在使用运行时即服务，并且我意识到我的职责，包括我负责升级和维护的内容！ 有些人称之为无服务器🫠

塞巴斯蒂安拿破仑 - 3 月 6 日

一旦暂停，peibolsang 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，peibolsang 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，peibolsang 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 peibolsang 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 peibolsang 的方法：

降低 peibolsang 发布的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 peibolsang 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

This is a short post.

The theory of Wardley mapping talks about how things get a new meaning as they evolve.

  • DevOps does not mean the same in 2023 as in 2013
  • Cloud does not mean the same in 2023 as in 2010
  • Platform does not mean the same in 2023 as in 2000
  • Serverless does not mean the same in 2023 as in 2016

So let me go back to some basics.

What is the cloud?

The concept of the cloud started as industrialized, interoperable, and commoditized infrastructure services built on standards and distributed over the wire to users. Today, the concept of cloud expanded this definition to include the idea of a system made of services, features, and principles that work in harmony to allow users to build the thing right. With this definition, the value proposition of cloud platforms is about meeting business leading goals such as speed of development, reliability, security, agility, and efficiency.

In 2023, we have three different levels of services offered by cloud platforms:

  • Infrastructure services: this collection of services and features are basically VMs offered as a service. Example: Amazon EC2

  • Runtime services: this collection of services and features are runtimes offered as a service. Example: AWS Lambda.

  • Application services: this collection of services and features are applications offered as a service. Example: Salesforce CRM.

The thing is that, in 2023, you don't need to own a data center and distribute infrastructure as pay-per-use services to be a cloud provider:

  • Fly.io is a cloud provider of infrastructure services
  • Vercel and Supabase are cloud providers for runtime services
  • Atlassian is a cloud provider of application services

What is content?

Content is the collection of things that platform users own and put in the platform to build the right thing. Content's value proposition is about meetings meeting business lagging goals such as growth, revenue, and customer satisfaction. In other words, content is defined by what the user owns on the platform.

We have different types of content depending on the services:

  • For infrastructure services: the user owns the runtimes, code, and data.

  • For runtime services: the user owns the code and data.

  • For application services: the user only owns the data.

What is serverless, then?

The concept of serverless started as on-demand functions thanks to services to Google AppEngine and AWS Lambda. Today, we can find complex definitions that include a combination of Functions as a Service and Backend as a Service, especially since the introduction of serverless containers. To me, the concept of serverless in 2023 evolved to runtimes as a service that scale to zero where users own the code and the data. It is that simple.

So, the moment I see a new service out there, I ask myself two questions:

  • What do I own?
  • How does it scale?

Depending on the answer to these two questions, I mentally categorize the type of platform I am working with. The moment I own code and data and the service scales to zero, I know I am using Runtime as a Service, and I am conscious of my duties, including what I am responsible for upgrading and maintaining! Some people call this serverless 🫠

Sebastien Napoleon - Mar 6

Once suspended, peibolsang will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, peibolsang will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by peibolsang will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If peibolsang is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag peibolsang:

Make all posts by peibolsang less visible

peibolsang consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging peibolsang will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: peibolsang

item.title: 快速访问修饰符 | Swift Access Modifiers
item.description:
访问修饰符是让我们控制类/结构/变量或方法的访问级别的标识符。

在 swift 中有以下访问修饰符 -
如果不提及任何内容，那么这是类/结构等获得的默认访问类型。
在这一实体中，可以在目标内访问和继承实体。

Access level - accessible & inheritable within target

示例 - 在下面的屏幕截图中，属性osName由于私有访问而无法访问。

示例 1 - 在下面的屏幕截图中，可以在其类范围之外访问属性osName ，因为这些类是在同一文件中创建的。

示例 2 - 在下面的屏幕截图中，属性osName不可访问，因为访问它的类不在创建 osName 的同一文件中。 因此，导致错误。

目标 1 -> 类ViewController
目标 2 > 类NRDropDownHelper

因此，导致错误。

将类访问权限更改为 public 后

  1. 它可以在 ViewController 中访问
  2. 然而不能在目标之外继承因此导致错误。

有了这个实体也可以在外部目标中访问和继承。

Access level - accessible and inheritable in other targets as well

示例类NRDropDownHelper是访问类，也是在类customHelper中继承的。



原文:

Access modifiers are the identifiers which let us control the access level of class/struct/variable or methods.

In swift there are following Access Modifiers -
1. internal - This is the default one. When don't mention any then this is the default type of access the class/struct etc get.
In this one entities can be access and inherited within the target.

Access level - accessible & inheritable within target

2. private - With this one entities are only accessible within class scope and, when accessed out of class then will give error.

Access level - within enclosing declaration

Example - In below screenshot , the property osName is inaccessible due to private access.

3. fileprivate - Just as the name explains, the entities are accessible within enclosing declaration and within same file i.e in which it is declared.

Access level - within enclosing declaration & within same file

Example 1 - In below screenshot, the property osName is accessible out of its class scope because those classes are created in same file.

Example 2 - In below screenshot, the property osName is inaccessible because the class accessing it is not in the same file in which osName was created. Hence, causes error.

4. public - This makes the entity accessible among other targets also however, they can't be inherited in the other targets.

Access level - accessible in other targets but not inheritable out of self target

_Example 1 - _
Target 1 -> class ViewController
Target 2 > class NRDropDownHelper

NRDropDownHelper is inaccessible in Target 1 (ViewController class) due to it's default internal level. Hence, causes error.

_Example 2 - _

After changing the class access to public

  1. It becomes accessible in ViewController
  2. Yet can't be inherited outside target hence causes error.

5. open - This is the highest level of access in swift. With this entities are accessible and inheritable in outside target as well.

Access level - accessible and inheritable in other targets as well

example class NRDropDownHelper is access and is also inherited in class customHelper.
item.author: nalineer

item.title: 英国论文写作服务 | Thesis Writing Services United Kingdom
item.description:
英国论文写作服务是那些发现论文助手撰写论文是一项艰巨且耗时的任务的学生的理想解决方案。 这些服务通常通过将学生与可以帮助他们满足写作需求的专业作家相匹配来发挥作用。 然后，写作服务会将订单分配给合格的作家，后者将撰写论文并在商定的截止日期前将其交付给学生。

这些服务可以很好地缓解与撰写论文相关的压力和焦虑，但在下订单之前确保您使用的是信誉良好的写作服务非常重要。 选择论文写作服务时，您应该考虑的一些关键因素是位置、可靠性和客户支持。

英国最好的论文写作服务应该能够以最实惠的价格提供一系列写作服务。 他们还应该有一个作家团队，他们是各自领域的专家，可以为所有学术水平的学生提供高质量的论文。

除了撰写论文外，他们还应该能够为客户提供硕士论文帮助编辑服务。 这意味着他们将通读完成的文档，以确保一切正确且语法合理。

论文写作服务还应提供每周 7 天、每天 24 小时的客户支持，以回答客户可能遇到的任何护理论文写作服务问题或疑虑。 这对于确保客户对他们的服务感到满意并且对最终产品感到满意至关重要。

这将确保客户在需要时始终能够获得帮助。 此外，如果客户对他们的工作不满意，这些服务应该能够为客户提供退款保证。

确保您获得优质服务的最佳方法是阅读营销论文撰写评论。 这些评论可以在许多不同的网站上找到，可以让您清楚地了解每项服务的质量和体验。

这些评论将使您了解论文写作服务是否可靠，以及他们是否有专家团队能够以可承受的价格提供高质量的论文。 您将能够在这些网站上找到所有主要的英国论文写作服务的评论，以便您可以选择最适合您需要的服务。

除了评论之外，在下订单之前进行自己的研究也是个好主意。 您应该能够查看该公司的网站，阅读他们的条款和条件，并与他们联系以确保他们是一家合法企业。

您还应该确保公司位于英国，以避免诈骗。 如果论文写作服务不在英国，那么它们很可能不是可靠的服务，您应该考虑寻找其他地方。



原文:

Thesis writing services uk are an ideal solution for those students who find dissertation helpers writing their thesis a daunting and time-consuming task. These services typically work by matching students with professional writers who can help them with their writing needs. The writing service will then assign an order to a qualified writer who will then work on the dissertation and deliver it to the student by the agreed-upon deadline.

These services can be a great way to alleviate the stress and anxiety buy dissertation help associated with writing a dissertation, but it is very important to ensure that you are working with a reputable writing service before placing an order. Some of the key factors that you should be considering when choosing a dissertation writing service are location, reliability, and customer support.

The best thesis writing services in the UK should be able to provide a range of writing services at an best dissertation editing services affordable price. They should also have a team of writers who are experts in their field and can provide high-quality dissertations for students of all academic levels.

In addition to writing dissertations, they should also be able to provide masters dissertation help editing services to their clients. This means that they will read through the finished document to ensure that everything is correct and grammatically sound.

A thesis writing service should also have customer support that is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week to answer any nursing dissertation writing services questions or concerns that the client may have. This is crucial to making sure that the client is happy with their service and that they are satisfied with the final product.

This will ensure that the client is always able to get help when they need it. Additionally, these services should be able to provide clients with a money-back guarantee if they are not satisfied with their work.

The best way to make sure that you are getting a good quality service is to read marketing dissertation writing reviews. These reviews can be found on many different websites and will give you a clear picture of the quality and experience of each service.

These reviews will allow you to see if the dissertation writing service is reliable and if they have a team of experts who can provide quality essays at an affordable price. You will be able to find reviews of all the major UK-based dissertation writing services on these websites so that you can choose the one that best suits your needs.

In addition to reviews, it is a good idea to conduct your own research before placing an order. You should dissertation proposal writing services be able to check out the company’s website, read their terms and conditions, and contact them to ensure that they are a legitimate business.

You should also ensure that the company is located in the UK to avoid scams. If a dissertation writing service is not located in the UK, then it’s likely that they are not a credible service and you should consider looking elsewhere.
